common.openLunch: Open for Lunch · Tuesday – Sunday · Reservations Strongly Advised

home.heroTagline: Ranked among the world's finest. Fire. Patience. Perfection.
home.philosophyQuote: "I want the fire to speak, not the chef."
home.philosophyBody: For four decades, Victor Arguinzoniz has refined a vocabulary of embers, woods and patience. Each ingredient is met by a custom-built grill engineered for its particular character — vine shoots for prawns, holm oak for beef, fruit wood for milk.
home.diningQuote: "The best restaurant in the world. And not just by title."
home.reserveTitle: Reserve your seat at the fire.
home.reserveBody: Tables open three months in advance. We seat fewer than fifty guests per service.

menu.title: The Tasting Menu
menu.subtitle: Market-driven. Fire-led. Seasonal.
menu.intro: A twelve-course offering guided each morning by the market and the season. Nothing is sauced. Nothing is hidden.
menu.extrasNote: Extras · Carabinero, percebes, caviar, bogavante, angulas available à la carte
menu.menuChanges: Menus change daily, guided by the morning's market and the season.

reservations.title: Reserve your seat
reservations.subtitle: Tables open three months in advance.
reservations.depositBody: A £50 per-guest deposit secures your reservation. Fully refundable up to 72 hours prior.
reservations.receipt: A receipt and itinerary have been sent to your email.
reservations.policy: Cancellations must be made 72 hours in advance. Card guarantee required.

findUs.title: A village in the shadow of Anboto.

footer.tagline: Fire. Patience. Perfection. A stone caserío where Basque mountains meet the oldest cooking method on earth.
